admin_go_config_desc: Enable group ordering and configure discount tiers based on the number of participants.
admin_go_toggle_hint: When disabled, no new group orders can be created.
admin_go_expiry_hint: Unchecked-out group orders are auto-deleted after this period. Minimum 5 minutes.
admin_go_tiers_hint: More participants → bigger discount. Tiers are auto-sorted by minimum participants.
admin_go_how_1: Users create a group order from the cart page
admin_go_how_2: Share the link — friends can join without registering
admin_go_how_3: Each person selects their own items
admin_go_how_4: When enough participants join, the configured discount % is applied automatically
admin_go_how_5: Host locks the order and chooses shared or individual payment
